name: ITS_primer_ITS1F
description: Fungal ITS conserved anchor / primer 'ITS1F' (length 22 bp). Consensus: CTTGGTCATTTAGAGGAAGTAA. Fungus-specific ITS forward in 18S; Gardes 1993. Conserved across Fungi at sub-1% mismatch; mapper should NOT tolerate high mismatch.
sources: White 1990 PCR Protocols (ITS1, ITS2, ITS3, ITS4)
